free_text: A self-supporting 600 mu-g/cm2 foil of 9Be was
in the experiment. An ionization chamber was used as a
common DeltaE-detector for two telescopes and
40 mu-m silicon dE-detector was applied in the third
telescope. Argon was used as a working gas in the
ionization chamber. Full energy losses were measured
The energy spread of the beam on a target
The error of the cross section normalization
